🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert HEIC to JPG on iPhone

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your HEIC files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

Your iPhone saves photos as HEIC to save space, but that format trips up a lot of apps and websites. You don't need an app from the App Store to fix it — this page works directly in Safari on your iPhone. Open it, pick the photos from your camera roll, and get JPG files you can share anywhere. Because the conversion happens on the phone itself, your personal photos are never sent to a server.

How to convert

  1. Open this page in Safari on your iPhone.
  2. Tap the box and choose Photo Library, then select your HEIC photos.
  3. Tap each converted JPG and use the Share icon to save it back to Photos or send it.

FAQ

Do I need to install an app?

No. This runs in Safari directly. There is nothing to download from the App Store.

Why does my iPhone save photos as HEIC?

HEIC stores the same quality in roughly half the file size. You can also switch to JPG in Settings > Camera > Formats > Most Compatible.
